## Type

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 📚 Documentation
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / chore
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Typecheck passes (`pnpm tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated via `pnpm changeset` (if user-facing)
- [ ] README / docs updated if public API changed
